since_last: 46% of 99 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.75%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 46% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.52% · Gold -0.60% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 46% of 99 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.75%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.75%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -1.38%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at -3.59%
cards.body: Leaders: WDAY +2.64%, NOW +1.87%, META +1.74%, BABA +1.22%, CRM +1.20%. Laggards: INTC -3.59%, MU -2.92%, TER -2.48%, LRCX -2.43%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.71% at $149.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.71% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
